faq.q: What makes this different from other online converters?
faq.a: The biggest advantages are 'Privacy' and 'No Limits.' While most sites upload your files to a server, we process everything inside your browser. Your data physically never leaves your device. This also means you can process gigabyte-sized files instantly without waiting for uploads.

faq.q: Is it really free for unlimited use?
faq.a: Yes, 100% free and unlimited. There are no credits, no subscriptions, and no hidden file-size paywalls. By leveraging your browser's power instead of expensive cloud servers, we provide a premium experience at zero cost to you.

faq.q: How do you convert without a server?
faq.a: We use cutting-edge WebAssembly (Wasm) to run 'FFmpeg'—the world's standard conversion engine—directly in your browser. This allows professional-grade file processing to happen locally on your computer or smartphone.

faq.q: Is it safe for confidential or private documents?
faq.a: Absolutely. This tool was designed specifically for privacy. Whether it's a legal contract (PDF), private photos with location data (HEIC/Exif), or family videos, your files stay under your control and never reach any external server.

We cover all essential formats: Images (HEIC, WebP, PNG, JPG), Video (MP4, MOV, WebM), Audio (MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC), and PDF to Word conversion. All tools support high-speed batch processing with single ZIP downloads.

image_page.title: Image Converter (HEIC/WebP Supported)
image_page.description: Batch convert and resize to PNG, JPG, and WebP. Convert iPhone HEIC securely in your browser.
image_page.secure_title: How to convert HEIC to JPG safely? (No Server Upload)
image_page.secure_desc: Photos contain personal data. Our tool never sends your files to a server—conversion happens entirely in your browser. Process highly sensitive or private photos with absolute peace of mind.
image_page.exif_title: How to strip GPS EXIF data? (Auto Privacy)
image_page.exif_desc: Remove location metadata quickly before sharing on social media. Our process drops EXIF data automatically, protecting your privacy completely inside the browser.
image_page.info_title: Blazing Fast HEIC to JPG & WebP Tools
image_page.iphone_title: Struggling to send iPhone HEIC files?
image_page.iphone_desc: Modern iPhones save images in HEIC, which many websites and older PCs cannot read. Seamlessly drop batches of HEIC files here and convert them to JPG effortlessly.
image_page.pro_title: WebP & PNG Batch Conversion Keeping Transparency
image_page.pro_desc: Vital for web developers: convert to modern WebP formats in seconds. Coupled with our batch resizing, drastically improve your site speed and workflow.

faq.q: Is it safe to upload my files to your server?
faq.a: Yes, absolutely safe. Our system operates entirely in your browser—meaning your image data is never sent to any server. Process your private HEIC photos with complete peace of mind.

faq.q: Can I batch convert massive amounts of iPhone HEIC photos?
faq.a: Yes! Just hit 'Process All' and our optimized browser engine will rapidly resize and convert them all to JPG or PNG, bundled neatly in a ZIP download.

video_page.title: Video Converter & Fast Compression
video_page.description: Convert to MP4 or WebM with device-specific presets. Zero large uploads since it runs entirely in your browser.
video_page.preset_desc: We automatically select the best resolution and bitrates for specific targets like YouTube or TikTok. Create maximum quality outputs without complex knowledge.
video_page.audio_desc: Need an audio track from a video? Easily strip out the audio cleanly into a high-res MP3 file for podcasting or remixing in a single click.
video_page.zap_desc: Video rendering takes time. Our converter features an exclusive parallel engine (FFmpeg.wasm) showing precise progress percentages, with no risk of network timeouts.
video_page.info_title: The Essential Tool for Content Creators
video_page.mov_title: Ultra-Fast Browser Engine for MOV to MP4
video_page.mov_desc: Quickly convert smartphone-recorded MOVs into highly compatible MP4s. Prevent frustrating import errors in video editing software.
video_page.privacy_desc: By converting confidential videos locally instead of using an external server, you effectively reduce the risk of information leaks to zero.

faq.q: Do I need to install software for large video conversions?
faq.a: No installation is required. Thanks to WebAssembly, your browser acts as a powerful conversion engine. Even massive video files begin processing instantly without waiting for slow server uploads.

faq.q: Can I extract just the audio in high quality?
faq.a: Yes. Easily select the 'Extract Audio (MP3)' preset to instantly strip out a pristine 320kbps MP3 track straight from your video file.

audio.security_notice: Processed securely in your browser. No external uploads.

audio_page.title: Audio Converter (Pro Settings)
audio_page.description: Convert MP3, WAV, AAC, and OGG with full control over bitrate and sample rate locally in your browser.
audio_page.spec_desc: Target true professional specs like 320kbps bitrate and 48kHz sampling rate. Guaranteed quality for audiophiles and streamers alike.
audio_page.lossless_desc: Convert high fidelity audio seamlessly. Our engine protects frequency ranges for flawless playback when transforming between complex formats.
audio_page.batch_title: Batch convert FLAC to MP3 and ZIP
audio_page.batch_desc: Drop an entire album of FLAC or WAV files. Skip manual configuration and seamlessly download everything wrapped in a neat ZIP archive at the end.
audio_page.wav_desc: Using modern encoding algorithms, our WAV to MP3 compression minimizes artifacts and preserves high-end clarity perfectly.
audio_page.limit_desc: No file size limitations or usage caps. Take full advantage of your local system's power to process massive albums effortlessly.

faq.q: Will my high-res audio quality be degraded?
faq.a: Not unless you want it to. We offer lossless compression conversion between FLAC/WAV as well as high fidelity 320kbps MP3 outputs, all configurable without sneaky quality drops.

faq.q: Can I convert a folder of songs into MP3s and save them as a ZIP?
faq.a: Yes! Drop multiple WAV or FLAC files at once. Once the batch process finishes, click 'Save All (ZIP)' to download the entire album instantly.

pdf_page.title: PDF Converter (High-Accuracy Word)
pdf_page.description: Extract text, images, or convert PDF to Word (.docx) while securely maintaining formatting layouts.
pdf_page.layout_desc: The biggest frustration in PDF to Word conversions is broken layouts. Our tool relies on advanced parsing to maintain fonts and placement rigorously.
pdf_page.secure_desc: Process contracts and proposals locally in the browser. Zero server uploads mean physical exclusion from external data breach risks.
pdf_page.info_title: For Any Business or Study Scenario
pdf_page.word_desc: Transform static PDFs into editable Word formats automatically. Cut back on re-typing and boost overall productivity instantly.
pdf_page.extract_desc: Need just the images from a PDF? Or pure text? We can pull out raw data flawlessly to aid your content creation workflows.

faq.q: Is my confidential PDF safe from information leaks when generating a Word file?
faq.a: Absolutely. The PDF parsing and Word (.docx) generation occur entirely within your browser runtime. Zero data is transmitted across the internet, ensuring maximum security for your sensitive documents.

faq.q: Will the PDF lose quality after compression?
faq.a: Our 'Recommended' setting balances visual fidelity and file size. Text remains sharp, while images are optimized. For extreme size reduction, choose 'Strong', though 'Recommended' is best for most professional needs.

pdf.processing_desc: Large documents or high-quality images may take longer to process.
